message:
refactor(buffer): defer inner service call until poll_ready succeeds

Add WaitingForReady state to BufferFuture that holds the request
until the inner service reports ready via poll_ready(). Previously,
Buffer::call() immediately locked the inner service and called it,
which could dispatch requests before the service was ready.

Now BufferFuture is a 4-state machine: WaitingForReady → Active →
Done (or Error). The WaitingForReady state polls the inner service's
readiness, registers inner_wakers for notification when readiness
changes, and only transitions to Active once poll_ready returns Ok.

SharedBuffer gains an inner_wakers mutex for coordinating readiness
notifications. BufferFuture's type signature adds an R parameter
for the request type. Drop impl now also wakes inner_wakers to
unblock other futures waiting for service readiness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
